title: Record-Lifecycle Disputable Signer-Only
description: EXT-35 fixture: only the `dispute` affordance enabled, scoped to signer per the FW-0034 default. Exercises the new-primitive shape (no kernelMode binding -- dispute is counter-attestation, NOT lifecycle state transition per ADR-0066 D-6.2). Note: amendmentTaxonomy is intentionally absent because dispute consumes no kernel mode; this is the valid 'dispute only, no kernel taxonomy needed' shape.
